watchlist.notes: AdCom July 29 CONFIRMED (Capricor press release Jun 26 2026). Price dropped to $21 (was $26 target). FDA reversed earlier no-AdCom decision and requested full HOPE-3 CSR Jan 2026 — signals open questions. Short interest 28% float, put/call 2.07, June 30 bearish block (2900 Aug $20 puts now ATM). Approval probability 40-50% — coin flip with fat tails. Bull: +50-100% → $31-42. Bear: -40-50% → $11-13. EV on $147 position: +$10. STRATEGY: sell AdCom reaction same day. Do NOT hold through PDUFA Aug 22.
